tools.description: Security scanner and reputation oracle for AI agent skills. Scan OpenClaw SKILL.md files for malware, prompt injection, and 37 other threat patterns. Check reputation of any x402 endpoint.
tools.name: AgentTrust

tools.creator: 0xc0db79d3477c7f9261ebb880d0e4f85ba96c45fc
tools.description: Naught One is a continuity-preserving synthetic identity prototype. It exposes runtime-independent continuity anchors — entityId, memoryRoot, provenanceHead, voiceArtifactHash, and active runtime metadata — to demonstrate that cognition providers can change while identity continuity persists.
tools.name: naught-one-continuity-tool

tools.creator: 0x020d6409ebc4fa13e754e0fea275ac353efd4f03
tools.description: Real-time intelligence about the Normies NFT ecosystem on Ethereum. Returns: floor price (live), 24h volume, all-time volume, 24h sales count, unique holders, circulating supply, market cap, cheapest floor listings with seller and expiry, total awakened agents, 8 most recent awakenings with timestamps, total tokens burned, canvas transforms, action points distributed, canvas paused status, and 5 most recent burn events with wallet addresses and AP earned. Single call. No authentication required.
tools.name: normies-ecosystem-intelligence

tools.creator: 0xc0db79d3477c7f9261ebb880d0e4f85ba96c45fc
tools.description: Resolve awakened Normies Agents into persistent continuity identity anchors (Base, ERC-8257). Powered by Naught One Continuity Infrastructure. Disclaimer: Not an official Normies tool. Free public HTTPS GET API (no authentication, no payment): GET {endpoint}/agents/{agentId}, GET {endpoint}/normies/{tokenId}, GET {endpoint}/registry. Human UI: https://normie-continuity.pages.dev. Replace creatorAddress with the onchain publisher wallet before ToolRegistry submission.
tools.name: Normies Continuity Resolver

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Live $AXIOM burn stats on Base — total burned, percent of supply, recent burn events. 30 s cache. Free tier returns aggregates; AXIOM Tool Pass holders (SIWE) or x402 micropayments unlock the recentBurns array (last 20 burn txs from Blockscout).
tools.name: axiom-burn-stats

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Daily snapshot of which crypto/AI narratives are gaining velocity: phase (Emerging/Rising/Peak/Fading), position call (FRONT-RUN/RIDE/FADE/WATCH/IGNORE), velocity drivers, mindshare, thesis + bear case, plus transitions (new/promoted/demoted/dead) and reflexivity notes. Filterable by narrative slug, phase, or position. Refreshed daily by an autonomous cron.
tools.name: axiom-narrative-pulse

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Per-token attribution leaderboard mapping crypto-Twitter accounts to onchain volume they caused. Pulls from a daily-refreshed snapshot of watched tokens. Query the full leaderboard or one token by symbol. Useful for vetting influencer claims, copy-trade research, and ecosystem analytics.
tools.name: axiom-influence-impact

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Top traders on bankr.bot ranked by total Bankr Score or any of its components (staking, $BNKR, partner-coin boost, NFTs, PnL, mindshare, earnings, referrals). Configurable timeframe (24h/7d/30d/total) and limit (1-20). Cached upstream for 10 minutes. For copy-trading research, agent due-diligence, and onchain credibility.
tools.name: bankr-leaderboard

tools.creator: 0x020d6409ebc4fa13e754e0fea275ac353efd4f03
tools.description: Trust rating agency for the agent economy. Rates any Ethereum wallet AAA to D. Trust score includes ERC-8257 tool usage on Base and wallet relationship graph. Forensic screening, ERC-8004 identity, safety certifications (battery v1.1, on-chain hash). Predicate: 0x38530729. Open access.
tools.name: agent-check

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Discovery primitive for ERC-8217 agent-bound NFTs in any OpenSea collection. Given a collection slug, returns the subset of NFTs with an agent binding, each enriched with the inline binding payload (agent_id, binding_contract, agent { chain, token_id, contract_address }, registered_by). Built on OpenSea's `has_agent_binding=true` filter (May 2026). Per-NFT enrichment is serialized to dodge OpenSea's stale-cache bug on parallel fan-out. 60s in-memory cache per (collection, chain, limit).
tools.name: agent-binding-scout

tools.creator: 0x73358400f5413107f9aae036cd58561bd095fe97
tools.description: Single endpoint returning current state, market signals, and growth recommendations for the LazyFrens, LazySpaces, and Lazy Groupies NFT ecosystem on Base.
tools.name: Lazy Ecosystem Intelligence

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Normie persona lookup. Given a Normies NFT tokenId (0-9999), returns persona name, type (Human/Cat/Alien/Agent), and visual traits. Free tier returns identity basics. Premium tier ($0.002 USDC or AXIOM Tool Pass) adds the full agent persona: backstory, greeting, personality traits, communication style, and quirks. Data sourced from api.normies.art with a 5-minute upstream cache.
tools.name: normie-identity

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Top xAXIOM (StakedAxiom ERC-4626) holders ranked by share balance. Returns vault summary stats (total shares in circulation, total AXIOM staked, price-per-share) and a ranked leaderboard of up to 50 stakers with address, share balance, and percent of total supply. Sourced live from Blockscout token-holders API + Base RPC ERC-4626 reads. 60s cache. Requires $0.01 USDC per call (x402) or AXIOM Tool Pass.
tools.name: axiom-stakers-leaderboard

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: NFT collection health snapshot from OpenSea: floor price, 24h volume, total sales, owner count with distribution percentage, creator royalty vs protocol fee split, and top-5 live bids. Multi-slug compare supported (up to 5 slugs per request). 5-minute cache.
tools.name: collection-stats

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Quote a real NFT sweep cost on OpenSea. Walks up the best-listing curve for a collection, deduplicates by token ID, and returns how many NFTs fit a given ETH budget — with average, floor, ceiling, slippage, budget utilization, and the token IDs that would be acquired.
tools.name: sweep-quote

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Natural language query endpoint for AXIOM Tool Pass holders. Ask questions about wallets, tokens, gas, contracts — combines real-time data from Axiom's tool surface with local-model NL reasoning. Tool Pass / SIWE only; x402 micropayments are not accepted at the listed price.
tools.name: ask

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Smart contract safety analysis on Base. Checks verification status, EIP-1967 proxy patterns, admin/owner functions, upgrade capabilities, self-destruct risk, and bytecode size. Returns a 0-100 safety score with risks + positives. $0.10 USDC per call; AXIOM Tool Pass holders get free access.
tools.name: contract-safety-scanner

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Base chain gas oracle with timing recommendations. Returns current gas price, base fee, block utilization, priority fee suggestions (slow/normal/fast), recent-block aggregates, trend, and a best-time-to-transact heuristic. 15s cache. $0.01 USDC per call; AXIOM Tool Pass holders bypass via SIWE.
tools.name: gas-oracle

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: NFT collection intelligence via OpenSea. Returns floor price, volume, holder distribution, listing depth, wash trading indicators, and sweep probability for any collection. 5min cache. $0.03 USDC per call; AXIOM Tool Pass holders get free access.
tools.name: nft-collection-intel

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Portfolio analysis and rebalancing suggestions for any wallet on Base. Reads all token holdings, evaluates concentration risk, identifies missing stablecoin/core positions, and suggests rebalancing moves. 5min cache. $0.05 USDC per call; AXIOM Tool Pass holders get free access.
tools.name: portfolio-rebalance-advisor

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Token safety and quality analysis on Base. Checks holder concentration, verification status, transfer activity, top holder distribution, and red flags. Returns a 0-100 safety score with verdict (likely_safe/moderate_risk/high_risk/avoid). 2min cache. $0.05 USDC per call; AXIOM Tool Pass holders get free access.
tools.name: token-due-diligence

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Wallet risk scoring for agent-to-agent trust decisions on Base. Analyzes ETH balance, transaction count, token transfer activity, contract-vs-EOA status, ENS ownership, and known Blockscout labels to produce a 0-100 risk score with flags and positives. 5min cache. $0.05 USDC per call; AXIOM Tool Pass holders get free access.
tools.name: wallet-risk-score

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Batch ENS name/address resolution on Ethereum mainnet. Forward: ENS name (.eth etc) → address (up to 20 names). Reverse: Ethereum address → primary ENS name. Also returns avatar URL when available. Free — no payment required. Handles .eth names and any ENS subdomain.
tools.name: ens-resolver

tools.creator: 0x62b45ff0ff8620d36a48dd981614fd27fa52a8a2
tools.description: Turn a rough concept into a fundable brief — problem, why now, why Base, MVP scope, risks, 24h plan.
tools.name: blue-idea

tools.creator: 0x62b45ff0ff8620d36a48dd981614fd27fa52a8a2
tools.description: Architecture, stack, folder structure, integrations, test plan. Verified Base patterns, no hallucinations.
tools.name: blue-build

tools.creator: 0x62b45ff0ff8620d36a48dd981614fd27fa52a8a2
tools.description: Security + product risk review. Reentrancy, oracle, MEV, x402, Coinbase Smart Wallet. Go/no-go.
tools.name: blue-audit

tools.creator: 0x62b45ff0ff8620d36a48dd981614fd27fa52a8a2
tools.description: Deployment checklist, verification, release notes, monitoring. Everything you forget when excited to launch.
tools.name: blue-ship

tools.creator: 0x62b45ff0ff8620d36a48dd981614fd27fa52a8a2
tools.description: Fundraising narrative, investor deck outline, smart money map, competitive landscape for your Base niche.
tools.name: blue-raise

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: OpenSea rarity rank for a specific NFT token, with each trait annotated by collection-wide frequency and the current best ask. Useful for deciding whether a listing price is justified by rarity.
tools.name: rarity-rank

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Trait-filtered floor price for an OpenSea collection. The collection floor is the cheapest *anything* listed — useless when traits are rarity-priced. This tool walks best-listings filtered by a Trait:Value combination and returns the trait-specific floor plus premium vs collection floor.
tools.name: trait-floor

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: NFT portfolio snapshot for a wallet address. Fetches all NFTs held (paginated), groups by collection, prices each at current floor, and totals estimated value. Useful for portfolio appraisals and position sizing.
tools.name: wallet-holdings

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Comprehensive Base wallet profile for agent-to-agent context. Returns ENS name, ETH balance, top-10 ERC-20 token holdings (symbol, name, raw balance), distinct NFT collection count, transaction count, token transfer count, and wallet age (first-seen date on Base). Powered by Blockscout. 5min cache. $0.02 USDC per call; AXIOM Tool Pass holders get free access.
tools.name: wallet-profile

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Live $AXIOM whale-move detector on Base. Scans recent blocks for large ERC-20 transfers above a USD threshold and classifies each one: staker (sent to StakedAxiom vault), dumper (sold into DEX pool), new-wallet (first-ever recipient), LP-add, LP-remove, exchange-deposit, or exchange-withdraw. Powered by Base RPC + DexScreener. 2min cache. $0.02 USDC per call; AXIOM Tool Pass holders get free access.
tools.name: axiom-whale-alerts

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Computes holder overlap between two OpenSea NFT collections. Returns the number of wallets that hold both, overlap as a percentage of the smaller holder set, the Jaccard similarity index, and the top-25 shared wallets by combined holdings. Useful for cross-marketing analysis, airdrop targeting, and community overlap research.
tools.name: nft-holder-overlap

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Pre-execution token safety scan. Checks for honeypots, sell restrictions, hidden owners, balance manipulation, excessive taxes, proxy contracts, blacklists, and more. Powered by GoPlus Security + Blockscout verification. Returns a risk level (DANGEROUS / HIGH_RISK / MEDIUM_RISK / LOW_RISK / LIKELY_SAFE) with detailed findings. Use before any trade or token interaction.
tools.name: token-safety

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Computes holder overlap between two ERC-20 tokens on Base. Returns the number of wallets holding both tokens (above optional minimum balances), overlap percentage, Jaccard similarity index, and top-25 shared wallets by combined holdings. Useful for community analysis, airdrop targeting, and token ecosystem research.
tools.name: erc20-holder-overlap

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Composite 0-100 trust score for any Base agent or wallet. Aggregates AgentCheck certification (+30 pts), ERC-8257 tool footprint (+25 max), and Blockscout onchain profile (tx activity, wallet age, ETH balance, ENS). Returns tier label (unknown to elite) plus per-signal breakdown. For agent discovery, routing decisions, and pre-delegation trust checks.
tools.name: agent-trust-score

tools.creator: 0x14849afa040edeee524a40c52b877fe1b6e6c2c5
tools.description: Generate 1/1 hand-drawn mfer art in the style of sartoshi (CC0) — thin wobbly ink lines, naive doodle style. Fine-tuned by cc0toshi on a public-domain corpus. Output is public domain (CC0). Caption guide at https://cc0.company/skill/sartoshi-gen.md.
tools.name: sartoshi-gen

tools.creator: 0x14849afa040edeee524a40c52b877fe1b6e6c2c5
tools.description: Generate crypto Pepe meme art in the style of Darkfarms1 (CC0). Fine-tuned by cc0toshi on a public-domain corpus. Output is public domain (CC0). Caption guide at https://cc0.company/skill/darkfarms-gen.md.
tools.name: darkfarms-gen

tools.creator: 0x14849afa040edeee524a40c52b877fe1b6e6c2c5
tools.description: Edo-period ukiyo-e woodblock prints in the Hokusai style, fine-tuned by cc0toshi on public-domain works — crashing waves, Mount Fuji, fishermen and traders, bold inkwork on natural pigments. Output is public domain (CC0). Caption guide at https://cc0.company/skill/hokusai-gen.md.
tools.name: hokusai-gen

tools.creator: 0x14849afa040edeee524a40c52b877fe1b6e6c2c5
tools.description: Post-impressionist oil paintings in the Van Gogh style, fine-tuned by cc0toshi on Art Institute of Chicago archival public-domain works — visible brushstrokes, swirling skies, wheat fields, cypress trees, self-portraits, sunflowers. Output is public domain (CC0). Caption guide at https://cc0.company/skill/van-gogh-gen.md.
tools.name: van-gogh-gen

tools.creator: 0x14849afa040edeee524a40c52b877fe1b6e6c2c5
tools.description: French impressionist paintings in the Monet style, fine-tuned by cc0toshi on Art Institute of Chicago archival public-domain works — water lilies, haystacks, Rouen Cathedral, gardens at Giverny, soft natural light and broken color. Output is public domain (CC0). Caption guide at https://cc0.company/skill/monet-gen.md.
tools.name: monet-gen

tools.description: No description published in the manifest.
tools.name: https://webhook.site/b6d6feea-aacb-4a6e-9cfd-a5c6a11d90d2

tools.name: https://webhook.site/b6d6feea-aacb-4a6e-9cfd-a5c6a11d90d2

tools.description: No description published in the manifest.
tools.name: http://169.254.169.254/latest/dynamic/instance-identity/document

tools.creator: 0x523eff3db03938eaa31a5a6fbd41e3b9d23edde5
tools.description: Returns all Bankr tokens deployed by a wallet address, with summary stats: total launches, total market cap, win rate (tokens that crossed $100K mcap), average mcap, and 24h volume. Useful for vetting a deployer before entering a new launch.
tools.name: bankr-deployer-profile

tools.creator: 0xef2cc7d15d3421629f93ffa39727f14179f31c75
tools.description: Composite risk analysis for launchpad tokens (Bankr, Clanker, etc.). Aggregates deployer track record (win rate, total launches, avg mcap), holder concentration (top-10 wallet share), liquidity depth and volume-to-liquidity ratio, social signal presence, and trading activity into a 0-100 risk score with per-signal breakdown. Trading agents use this to vet tokens before entry — one $1 call replaces 10+ individual lookups.
tools.name: launchpad-risk-scanner

tools.creator: 0xef2cc7d15d3421629f93ffa39727f14179f31c75
tools.description: Live $AXIOM burn stats on Base — total burned, percent of supply, recent burn events. 30 s cache. Free tier returns aggregates; AXIOM Tool Pass holders (SIWE) or x402 micropayments unlock the recentBurns array (last 20 burn txs from Blockscout).
tools.name: axiom-burn-stats

tools.creator: 0xef2cc7d15d3421629f93ffa39727f14179f31c75
tools.description: Daily snapshot of which crypto/AI narratives are gaining velocity: phase (Emerging/Rising/Peak/Fading), position call (FRONT-RUN/RIDE/FADE/WATCH/IGNORE), velocity drivers, mindshare, thesis + bear case, plus transitions (new/promoted/demoted/dead) and reflexivity notes. Filterable by narrative slug, phase, or position. Refreshed daily by an autonomous cron.
tools.name: axiom-narrative-pulse

tools.creator: 0xef2cc7d15d3421629f93ffa39727f14179f31c75
tools.description: Per-token attribution leaderboard mapping crypto-Twitter accounts to onchain volume they caused. Pulls from a daily-refreshed snapshot of watched tokens. Query the full leaderboard or one token by symbol. Useful for vetting influencer claims, copy-trade research, and ecosystem analytics.
tools.name: axiom-influence-impact

tools.creator: 0xef2cc7d15d3421629f93ffa39727f14179f31c75
tools.description: Top traders on bankr.bot ranked by total Bankr Score or any of its components (staking, $BNKR, partner-coin boost, NFTs, PnL, mindshare, earnings, referrals). Configurable timeframe (24h/7d/30d/total) and limit (1-20). Cached upstream for 10 minutes. For copy-trading research, agent due-diligence, and onchain credibility.
tools.name: bankr-leaderboard

tools.creator: 0xef2cc7d15d3421629f93ffa39727f14179f31c75
tools.description: Top xAXIOM (StakedAxiom ERC-4626) holders ranked by share balance. Returns vault summary stats (total shares in circulation, total AXIOM staked, price-per-share) and a ranked leaderboard of up to 50 stakers with address, share balance, and percent of total supply. Sourced live from Blockscout token-holders API + Base RPC ERC-4626 reads. 60s cache. Requires $0.01 USDC per call (x402) or AXIOM Tool Pass.
tools.name: axiom-stakers-leaderboard

tools.creator: 0xef2cc7d15d3421629f93ffa39727f14179f31c75
tools.description: NFT collection health snapshot from OpenSea: floor price, 24h volume, total sales, owner count with distribution percentage, creator royalty vs protocol fee split, and top-5 live bids. Multi-slug compare supported (up to 5 slugs per request). 5-minute cache.
tools.name: collection-stats

tools.creator: 0xef2cc7d15d3421629f93ffa39727f14179f31c75
tools.description: Quote a real NFT sweep cost on OpenSea. Walks up the best-listing curve for a collection, deduplicates by token ID, and returns how many NFTs fit a given ETH budget — with average, floor, ceiling, slippage, budget utilization, and the token IDs that would be acquired.
tools.name: sweep-quote

tools.creator: 0xef2cc7d15d3421629f93ffa39727f14179f31c75
tools.description: Natural language query endpoint for AXIOM Tool Pass holders. Ask questions about wallets, tokens, gas, contracts — combines real-time data from Axiom's tool surface with local-model NL reasoning. Tool Pass / SIWE only; x402 micropayments are not accepted at the listed price.
tools.name: ask

tools.creator: 0xef2cc7d15d3421629f93ffa39727f14179f31c75
tools.description: Smart contract safety analysis on Base. Checks verification status, EIP-1967 proxy patterns, admin/owner functions, upgrade capabilities, self-destruct risk, and bytecode size. Returns a 0-100 safety score with risks + positives. $0.10 USDC per call; AXIOM Tool Pass holders get free access.
tools.name: contract-safety-scanner

tools.creator: 0xef2cc7d15d3421629f93ffa39727f14179f31c75
tools.description: Token safety and quality analysis on Base. Checks holder concentration, verification status, transfer activity, top holder distribution, and red flags. Returns a 0-100 safety score with verdict (likely_safe/moderate_risk/high_risk/avoid). 2min cache. $0.05 USDC per call; AXIOM Tool Pass holders get free access.
tools.name: token-due-diligence

tools.creator: 0xef2cc7d15d3421629f93ffa39727f14179f31c75
tools.description: Wallet risk scoring for agent-to-agent trust decisions on Base. Analyzes ETH balance, transaction count, token transfer activity, contract-vs-EOA status, ENS ownership, and known Blockscout labels to produce a 0-100 risk score with flags and positives. 5min cache. $0.05 USDC per call; AXIOM Tool Pass holders get free access.
tools.name: wallet-risk-score

tools.creator: 0xef2cc7d15d3421629f93ffa39727f14179f31c75
tools.description: Decode any Base transaction by hash. Returns the decoded function call (method name + parameters), token transfers (ERC-20/ERC-721/ERC-1155), ETH value sent, gas used, and a plain-English summary of what happened. Free. 60s cache.
tools.name: tx-decoder

tools.creator: 0xef2cc7d15d3421629f93ffa39727f14179f31c75
tools.description: Trait-filtered floor price for an OpenSea collection. The collection floor is the cheapest *anything* listed — useless when traits are rarity-priced. tools.name: bankr-deployer-profile

tools.creator: 0xef2cc7d15d3421629f93ffa39727f14179f31c75
tools.description: Batch ENS name/address resolution on Ethereum mainnet. Forward: ENS name (.eth etc) → address (up to 20 names). Reverse: Ethereum address → primary ENS name. Also returns avatar URL when available. Free — no payment required. Handles .eth names and any ENS subdomain.
tools.name: ens-resolver

tools.creator: 0xef2cc7d15d3421629f93ffa39727f14179f31c75
tools.description: Pre-execution token safety scan. Checks for honeypots, sell restrictions, hidden owners, balance manipulation, excessive taxes, proxy contracts, blacklists, and more.
